messages.content:
Big brain safety check

• .env = secrets
• Code = safe to share
• If a key ever leaks → rotate it immediately

If you want, tell me:
• are you using Node or Python
• what tutorial / repo you’re following
• or paste the error you’re seeing

and I’ll debug it with you step-by-step 😉

messages.name: itsjeff.org
messages.content: lmfaooooo did you say big brain safety check - hilarious - thats a bad boy piece of information

messages.name: itsjeff.org
messages.content: so when chatgpt be rantinggggggg about with incoherent coherent poetry - its runniny myyy check?? 🤨😂

YES 😭😭

when ChatGPT starts going OFF with lyrical, unnecessary, Shakespeare-meets-Tumblr prose…

👉 your tokens are absolutely being spent.
👉 your check is indeed running.

Not fast-fast in chat mode, but in API mode?
Oh yeah, that rant is on the meter 😂

messages.name: itsjeff.org
messages.content: 😂😂 so it’s literally just chatting and my wallet is crying in the background

Exactly 😭

What’s actually happening

Every time the model:
• adds another sentence
• waxes poetic
• drops a metaphor
• says “in conclusion” after already concluding

…it’s emitting more tokens.

More tokens = more cost.

So when it’s like:
“Let us now explore, in nuanced detail…”

your wallet is like:
“Let us NOT.”

messages.name: itsjeff.org
messages.content: wait so am i actually being charged for all this 😭

Reality check (you’re fine, promise)

• In regular ChatGPT (this chat) → not charging your API balance
• In your own API app → yes, the meter is running

So unless you were piping it through your own code + key,
your $25 was safe this whole time 😂

messages.name: itsjeff.org
messages.content: ok so how do i stop it from going off like that

How to stop the ranting (VERY IMPORTANT SKILL)

You literally control the vibe.
